svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 92px; margin-left: 100px;

div.div: The last three tags focused on automation reliability, Feishu clawbot, and control-panel polish.

div.div:
Release flow uses the enhanced tag pipeline so operational
changes land as reviewable milestones instead of long-lived fork drift.
